dict.string: Said needs Input Monitoring to detect Caps Lock for recording and global shortcut keys (Ctrl+Cmd+V to paste, Option+1-5 for tone presets).
Said needs Accessibility access to paste polished text directly into other apps.
Said records your voice to transcribe and polish your text.
Said uses Apple Events to paste text into other apps.
Said uses Screen Recording permission for optional context awareness when improving dictation.
